message:
🐛 fix: mission landing page fails to resolve most KB directories (#2883)

buildMissionPaths() only tried 5 hardcoded directories (security,
cncf-generated, root, platform, install) but console-kb has 12
subdirectories. Missions in cncf-install, llm-d, multi-cluster,
troubleshoot, etc. all returned "Mission not found".

The fallback browse API also failed because it returns directories,
not individual files, so the slug match never worked.

Fix:
- Add all 12 known KB subdirectories to the lookup list
- Fire lookups in parallel (Promise.all) instead of sequential
- Fix fallback to use index.json (which has every mission path)
  instead of the browse API (which only lists directories)

Reported by multiple CNCF project maintainers via GitHub issues.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
